notes: SDD v2 cycle. Sprints 1-8 complete; Sprint 9 planned 2026-05-13 via cached v1 /sdd:sprint (v2 /sdd:plan source still pending plugin cache reinstall). Sprint 9 theme: cross-cutting Interview Command Behaviors + Context Management. Six items, sequential, autonomous mode. Items: (1) Clarifying-questions-don't-advance rule [PRD: aabh-aabj, 3 ACs, FB-007] — sdd-guide.md addition; (2) Bounded deepening rounds 5/10 cap [PRD: aabk-aabm, 3 ACs, FB-008] — deepening-rounds.md update; (3) End-of-round recommendation with reasoning [PRD: aabn-aabq, 4 ACs, FB-009+FB-010] — deepening-rounds.md update; (4) Active prompting per beat/topic [PRD: aabz-aacc, 4 ACs, FB-012] — sdd-guide.md addition; (5) Three-tier between-rounds context recommendation wire-through [PRD: aacm-aacs, 7 ACs, FB-014] — context-management.md content already complete, wire reference into sdd-guide + six interview commands; (6) Default /clear handoff between commands [PRD: aact-aacv, 3 ACs, FB-015] — spec-resolved handoff template inline in sdd-guide.md + wire into six interview commands. 24 ACs total. First multi-file sprint of the project — items 5 and 6 each touch six interview command SKILL.md files (scope, prd, spec, plan, refine, polish) plus sdd-guide. Out of scope: small-project detection in /sdd:scope (aabr-aabt), right-size behavior across commands (aabu-aaby), /sdd:prd-only stories (aacd-aacl), /sdd:discovery implementation (aaah-aaaq, blocked by this sprint per aaaj — unblocked after Sprint 9 closes), /sdd:polish re-open (aaev-aaex), Multi-Session Resume command implementations (aaar-aabg), Automatic Backlog Generation (aafs-aagd), Process Notes Growth (aage-aagn), v1-v2 Migration (aago-aahi), v2 Release Verification remaining (~9 ACs), /sdd:retro project-close (aaeq-aaeu). Sprint 9 is the biggest cross-cutting unblock in the project — closing it allows /sdd:discovery implementation to proceed in a subsequent sprint. Historical-AC backfill gap from Sprints 1-4 pre-Bug-Fix-2 work + Sprint 7 missing [FB:] tags (FB-017 through FB-023) remain maintainer PRD-hygiene.
